LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF THE ISSUES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE COURT DENIES SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND GRANTS SUMMARY ADJUDICATION ON ALL CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEPT THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION. SEE MINUTES FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: RAQUEL SHARP, CSR 10619 (925.384.0003, RAQUEL@TRANSCRIPTLEGAL.COM)
